§ 01Attendees

The following individuals are expected to attend the annual trustee review meeting:

Expected Attendees
{{trusteeName}}
{{sellerName}}, {{sellerTitle}}

Pre-read materials: Please review the repurchase obligation study, most recent valuation report, and Form 5500 filing prior to the meeting.
§ 02Plan Financial Health

A summary of the ESOP plan’s current financial position:

Plan Financial Summary
{{totalPlanAssets}}
{{currentStockValue}}
{{sharesAllocated}} of {{totalShares}}
{{participantCount}}
{{yoyChange}}
A.Funding status. {{fundingStatusDescription}}
B.Contribution history. Total company contributions in the review period: {{totalContributions}}. Employer stock contribution: {{stockContribution}}. Cash contribution: {{cashContribution}}.
C.Participant accounts. Average account balance: {{avgAccountBalance}}. Largest account: {{largestAccount}}. Vesting schedule: {{vestingSchedule}}.
§ 03Repurchase Obligation Update

The repurchase obligation represents the ESOP’s liability to purchase shares from participants upon separation from service. This is a critical long-term planning item.

Repurchase Liability Summary
{{currentRepurchaseLiability}}
{{projected5YearLiability}}
{{projected10YearLiability}}
{{fundingStrategy}}
A.Anticipated distributions. {{anticipatedDistributions}} — estimated participants eligible for distribution in the next 12 months.
B.Funding adequacy. {{fundingAdequacyAssessment}} — current reserves and projected cash flow to meet obligations.
C.Risk factors. {{riskFactors}} — key assumptions and sensitivities in the projection model.
Full study available: The complete repurchase obligation study was prepared on {{studyDate}} and is available for review. Contact Forhemit for the latest version.
§ 04Valuation Review

A summary of the most recent independent valuation and historical trends:

Valuation Summary
{{appraisalDate}}
{{fmvPerShare}}
{{totalEquityValue}}
{{valuationMethodology}}
{{priorYearFMV}}
A.Year-over-year trend. {{valuationTrend}} — key drivers of change include {{valuationDrivers}}.
B.Trustee review. {{trusteeValuationNotes}} — the trustee has reviewed the appraisal and {{trusteeValuationAction}}.
C.Concerns or observations. {{valuationConcerns}}
§ 05Compliance & Regulatory

Status of key compliance items and regulatory filings:

A.Form 5500. Filed for plan year {{form5500PlanYear}} on {{form5500FilingDate}}. {{form5500Status}}.
B.Summary Annual Report (SAR). {{sarStatus}} — distributed to participants on {{sarDistributionDate}}.
C.DOL audit status. {{dolAuditStatus}}
D.Plan document amendments. {{planAmendmentStatus}} — any required amendments based on regulatory changes or operational modifications.
E.Participant statements. Annual statements distributed on {{statementDistributionDate}}. {{statementNotes}}
F.Diversification compliance. {{diversificationStatus}} — eligible participants notified of diversification rights.
Counsel input requested: ERISA counsel to confirm all plan amendments are current and advise on any pending regulatory guidance affecting the ESOP.

The following items require trustee decision or approval at this meeting:

4.{{actionItem4}} — {{actionItem4Detail}}
5.{{actionItem5}} — {{actionItem5Detail}}
§ 07Next Meeting

The next annual trustee review meeting is tentatively scheduled for:

Next Meeting
{{nextMeetingDate}}
{{nextMeetingLocation}}

Preliminary agenda items for the next meeting:

A.Updated repurchase obligation projection
B.Next annual valuation review
C.Plan compliance and regulatory updates
D.Participant account and distribution review
Reminder: Materials for the next meeting should be distributed at least 14 days in advance to allow adequate review time for all attendees.
